summary: The diff implements REQ-2 (present/leaving time fields) with backend record type changes, migration, UI hooks, and display. REQ-1 (fix inverted name display) is referenced in the project state but no actual code change fixing name inversion is evident in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the attendance system so that registered person names are displayed in the correct (non-inverted) order in the attendance list UI. Names should appear exactly as they were registered, not reversed or flipped.
missing_requirements.reason: No code change in the diff addresses name inversion. There is no evidence of a fix in AttendanceMonitor.tsx, backend/main.mo, or any other file that reverses or corrects name ordering logic. The project_state.json lists this as pending and the known_issues still mentions the inversion bug.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module is added as a separate file backend/migration.mo containing backend logic outside the single actor
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint states all backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo. Adding a separate migration.mo module introduces backend logic outside that single actor file.
